name: Estonian Environment Agency (Keskkonnateenistused) Data Portal API / WFS services
description: Open data API providing access to Estonian National Geoportal spatial data services, including environmental, meteorological, hydrological, and geographic datasets. Based on Web Feature Service (WFS) standards for retrieving geospatial features.
